Who I Am

I'm Syed Adil Ali, a frontend-focused full-stack developer from Punjab, India. I build production-ready web apps using React, Node.js, and real-time technologies.

Strong foundation in solving real problems with clean, scalable code. Currently pursuing B.Tech at CT Group of Institutions and actively seeking internship opportunities.
